auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Massive (formerly Polygon.io) REST API key passed as the apiKey query parameter. Get it from your dashboard keys page: https://massive.com/dashboard/keys.

actions.name: get_aggregate_bars
actions.description: Get historical OHLC aggregate bars for a stock ticker over a custom range.

ticker.description: The case-sensitive ticker symbol, for example AAPL.

multiplier.description: The size multiplier for the timespan.

from.description: A date in YYYY-MM-DD format or a millisecond timestamp.

to.description: A date in YYYY-MM-DD format or a millisecond timestamp.

adjusted.description: Whether the results should be adjusted for splits.

sort.description: The order used when sorting returned results.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving custom aggregate stock bars.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The ticker symbol returned by Polygon.io.
Whether the response was adjusted for splits.
The number of base aggregates queried.
The total number of results for the request.
The ticker symbol for this aggregate bar when present.
The open price for the aggregate window.
The high price for the aggregate window.
The low price for the aggregate window.
The close price for the aggregate window.
The trading volume for the aggregate window.
The volume weighted average price.
The Unix millisecond timestamp for the aggregate window.
The transaction count for the aggregate window.
Whether the aggregate is for an OTC ticker when reported.

raw.description: The raw aggregate bar object returned by Polygon.io.

items.description: A normalized OHLC aggregate bar returned by Polygon.io.

bars.description: The aggregate bars returned by Polygon.io.

anyOf.description: The next page URL returned by Polygon.io when present.
The cursor extracted from nextUrl when present.

page.description: Cursor pagination information returned by Polygon.io.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for Polygon.io aggregate bars.

actions.name: get_market_status
actions.description: Get the current Polygon.io market status for stocks, currencies, and indices.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for retrieving Polygon.io market status.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The overall market status.
The server time returned by Polygon.io.
Whether the market is in post-market hours.
Whether the market is in pre-market hours.

exchanges.description: Status values keyed by exchange name.

currencies.description: Status values keyed by currency market name.

indicesGroups.description: Status values keyed by index group name.

raw.description: The raw market status object returned by Polygon.io.

outputSchema.description: The current market status returned by Polygon.io.

actions.name: get_previous_day_bar
actions.description: Get the previous trading day's OHLC aggregate bar for a stock ticker.

ticker.description: The case-sensitive ticker symbol, for example AAPL.

adjusted.description: Whether the results should be adjusted for splits.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a previous day stock bar.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The ticker symbol returned by Polygon.io.
Whether the response was adjusted for splits.
The number of base aggregates queried.
The total number of results for the request.
The ticker symbol for this aggregate bar when present.
The open price for the aggregate window.
The high price for the aggregate window.
The low price for the aggregate window.
The close price for the aggregate window.
The trading volume for the aggregate window.
The volume weighted average price.
The Unix millisecond timestamp for the aggregate window.
The transaction count for the aggregate window.
Whether the aggregate is for an OTC ticker when reported.

raw.description: The raw aggregate bar object returned by Polygon.io.

items.description: A normalized OHLC aggregate bar returned by Polygon.io.

bars.description: The aggregate bars returned by Polygon.io.

actions.name: get_ticker_details
actions.description: Get comprehensive details for a single Polygon.io ticker.

ticker.description: The case-sensitive ticker symbol, for example AAPL.

date.description: Retrieve ticker details available on this date.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Polygon.io ticker details.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The exchange symbol that this asset is traded under.
The asset name returned by Polygon.io.
The market type for the asset.
The locale for the asset.
Whether the asset is actively traded.
The ticker type code.
The currency name returned by Polygon.io.
The Central Index Key for this ticker when present.
The composite OpenFIGI identifier.
The share class OpenFIGI identifier.
The primary exchange MIC for this asset.
The company or asset description.
The company's homepage URL.
The date that the symbol was first publicly listed.
The market capitalization value when present.
The company phone number.
The round lot size for this security.
The outstanding share count for this share class.
The Standard Industrial Classification code.
The Standard Industrial Classification description.
The root symbol for tickers with suffixes.
The ticker suffix when present.
The approximate employee count.
The weighted shares outstanding value.
The first address line.
The city name.
The state value.
The postal code.
Company headquarters address details returned by Polygon.io.
The company icon URL.
The company logo URL.
Company branding asset URLs returned by Polygon.io.

raw.description: The raw ticker details object returned by Polygon.io.

ticker.description: Detailed ticker information returned by Polygon.io.

outputSchema.description: The response returned for Polygon.io ticker details.

actions.name: list_exchanges
actions.description: List known exchanges available through Polygon.io.

assetClass.description: Filter by asset class such as stocks, options, crypto, fx, or futures.

locale.description: Filter by exchange locale such as us or global.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Polygon.io exchanges.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The Polygon.io exchange identifier.
The exchange type returned by Polygon.io.
The asset class for this exchange.
The locale for this exchange.
The exchange name.
The exchange acronym.
The Market Identifier Code for this exchange.
The MIC for the entity that operates this exchange.
The participant identifier used by SIPs.
The exchange website URL when present.

raw.description: The raw exchange object returned by Polygon.io.

items.description: A normalized exchange returned by Polygon.io.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Polygon.io exchanges.

actions.name: list_ticker_types
actions.description: List ticker type codes supported by Polygon.io.

assetClass.description: Filter by asset class such as stocks, options, crypto, fx, or indices.

locale.description: Filter by ticker type locale such as us or global.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Polygon.io ticker types.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The ticker type code used by Polygon.io.
The ticker type description.
The asset class for this ticker type.
The locale for this ticker type.

raw.description: The raw ticker type object returned by Polygon.io.

items.description: A normalized ticker type returned by Polygon.io.

tickerTypes.description: The ticker types returned by Polygon.io.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Polygon.io ticker types.

actions.name: list_tickers
actions.description: List ticker symbols supported by Polygon.io with optional filters.

ticker.description: Filter by an exact ticker symbol.

type.description: Filter by ticker type such as CS or ETF.

market.description: Filter by market type such as stocks, crypto, fx, otc, or indices.

exchange.description: Filter by primary exchange Market Identifier Code.

cusip.description: Filter by CUSIP code. Polygon.io does not return CUSIP in responses.

date.description: Retrieve tickers available on this date.

search.description: Search terms within the ticker and company name.

active.description: Whether returned tickers should be actively traded on the queried date.

tickerGte.description: Return tickers greater than or equal to this ticker.

tickerGt.description: Return tickers greater than this ticker.

tickerLte.description: Return tickers less than or equal to this ticker.

tickerLt.description: Return tickers less than this ticker.

order.description: The order used when sorting returned results.

limit.description: The maximum number of ticker results to return.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor extracted from a previous response nextCursor value.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Polygon.io tickers.

anyOf.description: The response status returned by Polygon.io.
The request identifier assigned by Polygon.io.
The count value returned by Polygon.io when present.

meta.description: Common response metadata returned by the Polygon.io REST API.

anyOf.description: The exchange symbol that this asset is traded under.
The asset name returned by Polygon.io.
The market type for the asset.
The locale for the asset.
Whether the asset is actively traded.
The ticker type code.
The currency name returned by Polygon.io.
The currency symbol returned by Polygon.io.
The base currency name for crypto or FX assets.
The base currency symbol for crypto or FX assets.
The Central Index Key for this ticker when present.
The composite OpenFIGI identifier.
The share class OpenFIGI identifier.
The primary exchange MIC for this asset.
The timestamp through which this ticker information is accurate.
The last date that the asset was traded when present.

raw.description: The raw ticker object returned by Polygon.io.

items.description: A normalized ticker summary returned by Polygon.io.

anyOf.description: The next page URL returned by Polygon.io when present.
The cursor extracted from nextUrl when present.

page.description: Cursor pagination information returned by Polygon.io.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when listing Polygon.io tickers.
